title: Paying with Tap to Pay
description: Learn how to complete a payment using Tap to Pay.

tips.title: Open Products
tips.message: Tap the Products tab to browse available products.

tips.title: Search for a Product
tips.message: Use the search bar to find the product you need.

tips.title: Add to Basket
tips.message: Tap the product to add it to your basket.

tips.title: Go to Checkout
tips.message: Tap the checkout button to proceed with payment.

tips.title: Tap to Pay
tips.message: Tap the Tap to Pay button to complete the payment.
